title: Positive flow: Successful account creation
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Enter a valid name in the 'Your name' field. | Enter a valid email in the 'Your email' field. | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: A confirmation message should appear indicating successful account creation. | The user should be redirected to the login page.

title: Negative flow: Missing required fields
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Leave the 'Your name' field empty. | Enter a valid email in the 'Your email' field. | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the 'Your name' field is required.

title: Negative flow: Invalid email format
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Enter an invalid email format in the 'Your email' field. | Enter a valid name in the 'Your name' field. | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the email format is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Invalid password format
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Enter a valid name in the 'Your name' field. | Enter an invalid email format in the 'Your email' field. | Enter an invalid password format in the 'Password' field. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the password format is invalid.

title: Negative flow: Duplicate email
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Enter a valid name in the 'Your name' field. | Enter an existing email in the 'Your email' field. | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the email is already in use.

title: Negative flow: Empty password
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Enter a valid name in the 'Your name' field. | Enter a valid email in the 'Your email' field. | Leave the 'Password' field empty. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the password is required.

title: Negative flow: Empty name
test_steps: Open the CareZone app. | Navigate to the account creation page. | Leave the 'Your name' field empty. | Enter a valid email in the 'Your email' field. | Enter a valid password in the 'Password' field. | Click on the 'CREATE A FREE ACCOUNT' button.
expected_result: An error message should appear indicating that the name is required.
